title: [release-1.39] chore(deps): update module github.com/go-jose/go-jose/v4 to v4.0.5 [security]
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #6005

/assign nalind

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *nalind*, *openshift-cherrypick-robot* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.39/OWNERS)~~ [nalind] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
FWIW, this does NOT fix https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-80608.  That card is against RHEL 10.1.  The release-1.39 branch is for RHEL 10.0 and  currently has no card for this issue.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Which other branches does this need to be, or not, cherry-picked onto?

@nalind: new pull request created: #6040

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6009#issuecomment-2705036837):

>/cherry-pick release-1.38
